API Reference¶

Package¶

nanohubqe: tools for Quantum ESPRESSO input generation and analysis.

Core Modules¶

Input deck builders for Quantum ESPRESSO pw.x calculations.

exception nanohubqe.deck.DeckValidationError[source]¶

Raised when a PWInputDeck contains invalid or inconsistent data.

class nanohubqe.deck.Species(symbol, mass_amu, pseudo_file)[source]¶

Atomic species definition in ATOMIC_SPECIES card.

Parameters:

  • symbol (str)

  • mass_amu (float)

  • pseudo_file (str)

class nanohubqe.deck.Atom(symbol, position)[source]¶

Atom entry in ATOMIC_POSITIONS card.

Parameters:

  • symbol (str)

  • position (tuple[float, float, float])

class nanohubqe.deck.PWInputDeck(control, system, electrons=<factory>, ions=<factory>, cell=<factory>, atomic_species=<factory>, atomic_positions=<factory>, atomic_positions_mode='crystal', k_points_mode='automatic', k_points=(1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0), cell_parameters=None, cell_parameters_mode='angstrom', extra_cards=<factory>)[source]¶

Represents a complete pw.x input deck.

Parameters:

  • control (dict[str, Any])

  • system (dict[str, Any])

  • electrons (dict[str, Any])

  • ions (dict[str, Any])

  • cell (dict[str, Any])

  • atomic_species (list[Species])

  • atomic_positions (list[Atom])

  • atomic_positions_mode (str)

  • k_points_mode (str)

  • k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int] | Sequence[Sequence[float | int]] | None)

  • cell_parameters (list[tuple[float, float, float]] | None)

  • cell_parameters_mode (str)

  • extra_cards (list[str])

to_string()[source]¶

Render the full pw.x input deck text.

Return type:

str

write(path)[source]¶

Write the rendered input deck to path and return the resolved path.

Parameters:

path (str | Path)

Return type:

Path

Workflow helpers for multi-step Quantum ESPRESSO simulations.

class nanohubqe.workflow.QEStep(executable='pw.x', deck=None, input_text=None, args=<factory>, input_mode='flag', input_flag='-in', input_filename=None, output_filename=None, submit_input_files=<factory>, expected_output_files=<factory>, expected_output_globs=<factory>, env=<factory>, notes=None)[source]¶

Single executable step in a Quantum ESPRESSO workflow.

Parameters:

  • executable (str)

  • deck (PWInputDeck | None)

  • input_text (str | None)

  • args (list[str])

  • input_mode (Literal['flag', 'stdin', 'none'])

  • input_flag (str)

  • input_filename (str | None)

  • output_filename (str | None)

  • submit_input_files (list[str])

  • expected_output_files (list[str])

  • expected_output_globs (list[str])

  • env (dict[str, str])

  • notes (str | None)

with_filenames(*, step_name, input_suffix='.in', output_suffix='.out')[source]¶

Return a copy with default input/output filenames resolved.

Parameters:

  • step_name (str)

  • input_suffix (str)

  • output_suffix (str)

Return type:

QEStep

render_input()[source]¶

Render input text from deck/text payload.

Return type:

str | None

validate()[source]¶

Validate that the step configuration is coherent.

Return type:

None

class nanohubqe.workflow.QEWorkflow(name, steps, order, notes=None, metadata=<factory>)[source]¶

A named sequence of executable Quantum ESPRESSO steps.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • steps (dict[str, QEStep | PWInputDeck])

  • order (list[str])

  • notes (str | None)

  • metadata (dict[str, str])

iter_steps(*, input_suffix='.in', output_suffix='.out')[source]¶

Return ordered (step_name, step) pairs.

Parameters:

  • input_suffix (str)

  • output_suffix (str)

Return type:

list[tuple[str, QEStep]]

write(directory, suffix='.in')[source]¶

Write each step input file to directory and return paths.

Parameters:

  • directory (str | Path)

  • suffix (str)

Return type:

dict[str, Path]

Execution helpers for local and HUBzero submit-based Quantum ESPRESSO runs.

class nanohubqe.runner.SubmitConfig(venue=None, n_cpus=None, wall_time=None, run_name=None, input_files=<factory>, env=<factory>, parameters=None, extra_args=<factory>)[source]¶

Configuration for remote execution via the HUBzero submit command.

Parameters:

  • venue (str | None)

  • n_cpus (int | None)

  • wall_time (str | None)

  • run_name (str | None)

  • input_files (list[str])

  • env (dict[str, str])

  • parameters (str | None)

  • extra_args (list[str])

class nanohubqe.runner.ExecutionResult(command, returncode, stdout, stderr, workdir, input_file, output_file, expected_outputs=<factory>, discovered_outputs=<factory>, submitted=False)[source]¶

Result returned by QERunner.run and QERunner.run_workflow.

Parameters:

  • command (list[str])

  • returncode (int)

  • stdout (str)

  • stderr (str)

  • workdir (Path)

  • input_file (Path | None)

  • output_file (Path)

  • expected_outputs (list[str])

  • discovered_outputs (list[Path])

  • submitted (bool)

class nanohubqe.runner.QERunner(pw_executable='pw.x', submit_executable='submit', mpi_prefix=<factory>, default_backend='local')[source]¶

Run pw.x calculations locally or through the HUBzero submit wrapper.

Parameters:

  • pw_executable (str)

  • submit_executable (str)

  • mpi_prefix (list[str])

  • default_backend (str)

build_step_command(step)[source]¶

Build the command line for an executable workflow step.

Parameters:

step (QEStep)

Return type:

list[str]

build_submit_command(qe_command, submit_config)[source]¶

Build a HUBzero submit command around a QE command.

Parameters:

  • qe_command (Sequence[str])

  • submit_config (SubmitConfig)

Return type:

list[str]

run(deck, *, workdir, input_filename='qe.in', output_filename='qe.out', backend=None, submit_config=None, timeout=None, dry_run=False)[source]¶

Write a pw.x input deck and execute it.

Parameters:

  • deck (PWInputDeck)

  • workdir (str | Path)

  • input_filename (str)

  • output_filename (str)

  • backend (str | None)

  • submit_config (SubmitConfig | None)

  • timeout (float | None)

  • dry_run (bool)

Return type:

ExecutionResult

run_step(step, *, step_name, workdir, backend=None, submit_config=None, timeout=None, dry_run=False)[source]¶

Execute a single workflow step.

Parameters:

  • step (QEStep)

  • step_name (str)

  • workdir (str | Path)

  • backend (str | None)

  • submit_config (SubmitConfig | None)

  • timeout (float | None)

  • dry_run (bool)

Return type:

ExecutionResult

run_workflow(workflow, *, workdir, backend=None, submit_config=None, timeout=None, dry_run=False, input_suffix='.in', output_suffix='.out', output_record_filename='workflow_outputs.json', run_xml_filename='run.xml')[source]¶

Run each step in a QEWorkflow sequentially.

Parameters:

  • workflow (QEWorkflow)

  • workdir (str | Path)

  • backend (str | None)

  • submit_config (SubmitConfig | None)

  • timeout (float | None)

  • dry_run (bool)

  • input_suffix (str)

  • output_suffix (str)

  • output_record_filename (str | None)

  • run_xml_filename (str | None)

Return type:

dict[str, ExecutionResult]

static write_workflow_output_record(results, path, *, workflow_name=None)[source]¶

Write a JSON record of expected and discovered outputs for each step.

Parameters:

  • results (Mapping[str, ExecutionResult])

  • path (str | Path)

  • workflow_name (str | None)

Return type:

Path

static write_workflow_run_xml(results, path, *, workflow_name=None, tool_id='nanohubqe', tool_name='nanohub-qe', tool_command=None)[source]¶

Write a Rappture-style run.xml with step inputs and outputs.

Parameters:

  • results (Mapping[str, ExecutionResult])

  • path (str | Path)

  • workflow_name (str | None)

  • tool_id (str)

  • tool_name (str)

  • tool_command (str | None)

Return type:

Path

nanohubqe.runner.submit_env(**variables)[source]¶

Small helper to build submit environment mappings.

Parameters:

variables (str)

Return type:

Mapping[str, str]

Environment module loader for nanoHUB Quantum ESPRESSO workflows.

This mirrors the nanoHUB-style use module behavior in pure Python so Jupyter notebooks can load Quantum ESPRESSO before running workflows.

nanohubqe.use.use(name)[source]¶

Load a nanoHUB environment module by name.

Parameters:

name (str)

Return type:

None

nanohubqe.use.list_available_modules(pattern=None)[source]¶

List available environment modules in ENVIRON_CONFIG_DIRS.

Parameters:

pattern (str | None)

Return type:

list[str]

nanohubqe.use.load_quantum_espresso(module_name=None)[source]¶

Load a Quantum ESPRESSO module and return the module name.

If module_name is omitted, the function auto-detects the best candidate from available modules using name heuristics.

Parameters:

module_name (str | None)

Return type:

str

nanohubqe.use.load_qe(module_name=None)[source]¶

Alias for load_quantum_espresso().

Parameters:

module_name (str | None)

Return type:

str

Templates and Postprocessing¶

Reusable templates for common Quantum ESPRESSO simulations.

nanohubqe.templates.silicon_scf(*, a=5.43, ecutwfc=45.0, ecutrho=None, k_points=(8, 8, 8, 1, 1, 1), pseudo_file='Si.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', calculation='scf', prefix='si', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp', conv_thr=1e-08, mixing_beta=0.3)[source]¶

Silicon diamond primitive cell SCF template.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • calculation (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

  • conv_thr (float)

  • mixing_beta (float)

Return type:

PWInputDeck

nanohubqe.templates.graphene_relax(*, a=2.46, vacuum=18.0, ecutwfc=60.0, ecutrho=None, k_points=(12, 12, 1, 0, 0, 0), pseudo_file='C.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', prefix='graphene', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp', conv_thr=1e-09)[source]¶

Graphene 2D cell geometry relaxation template.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • vacuum (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

  • conv_thr (float)

Return type:

PWInputDeck

nanohubqe.templates.aluminum_vc_relax(*, a=4.05, ecutwfc=45.0, ecutrho=None, k_points=(12, 12, 12, 1, 1, 1), pseudo_file='Al.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', prefix='al', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp', conv_thr=1e-09, press_conv_thr=0.5)[source]¶

FCC aluminum variable-cell relaxation template.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

  • conv_thr (float)

  • press_conv_thr (float)

Return type:

PWInputDeck

nanohubqe.templates.silicon_bands_workflow(*, a=5.43, ecutwfc=45.0, ecutrho=None, scf_k_points=(8, 8, 8, 1, 1, 1), pseudo_file='Si.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', prefix='si_bands', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp')[source]¶

Two-step silicon band structure workflow: SCF then BANDS.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • scf_k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

Return type:

QEWorkflow

nanohubqe.templates.silicon_eos_workflow(*, a0=5.43, scale_factors=(0.94, 0.96, 0.98, 1.0, 1.02, 1.04, 1.06), ecutwfc=45.0, ecutrho=None, k_points=(8, 8, 8, 1, 1, 1), pseudo_file='Si.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', prefix='si_eos', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp')[source]¶

Silicon equation-of-state workflow using a lattice-constant sweep.

Parameters:

  • a0 (float)

  • scale_factors (tuple[float, ...])

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

Return type:

QEWorkflow

nanohubqe.templates.aluminum_dos_pdos_workflow(*, a=4.05, ecutwfc=45.0, ecutrho=None, scf_k_points=(12, 12, 12, 1, 1, 1), nscf_k_points=(24, 24, 24, 1, 1, 1), pseudo_file='Al.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', prefix='al_dos', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp', dos_emin=-15.0, dos_emax=15.0, dos_deltae=0.01)[source]¶

Metal DOS/PDOS workflow: SCF -> NSCF -> DOS/PROJWFC post-processing.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • scf_k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • nscf_k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

  • dos_emin (float)

  • dos_emax (float)

  • dos_deltae (float)

Return type:

QEWorkflow

nanohubqe.templates.silicon_phonon_dispersion_workflow(*, a=5.43, ecutwfc=45.0, ecutrho=None, scf_k_points=(8, 8, 8, 1, 1, 1), q_grid=(4, 4, 4), pseudo_file='Si.pbe-n-kjpaw_psl.1.0.0.UPF', prefix='si_ph', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp')[source]¶

Silicon phonon workflow: SCF -> PH -> Q2R -> MATDYN.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float | None)

  • scf_k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • q_grid (tuple[int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

Return type:

QEWorkflow

nanohubqe.templates.silicon_bands_dos_reference_workflow(*, a=5.43, ecutwfc=16.0, ecutrho=96.0, nbnd=8, scf_k_points=(8, 8, 8, 0, 0, 0), pseudo_file='Si.UPF', title='Silicon band structure', prefix='qe', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp', conv_thr=1e-06, dos_emin=-6.0, dos_emax=10.0, dos_deltae=0.1, bands_k_path=None, include_plotband=True, plotband_fermi_ev=0.0, plotband_weight=1.0)[source]¶

Reference silicon SCF + DOS + bands workflow mirroring the nanoHUB dftqe pattern.

Parameters:

  • a (float)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float)

  • nbnd (int)

  • scf_k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • pseudo_file (str)

  • title (str)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

  • conv_thr (float)

  • dos_emin (float)

  • dos_emax (float)

  • dos_deltae (float)

  • bands_k_path (list[tuple[float, float, float, float]] | None)

  • include_plotband (bool)

  • plotband_fermi_ev (float)

  • plotband_weight (float)

Return type:

QEWorkflow

nanohubqe.templates.bulk_electronic_phonon_workflow(*, symbol='Si', structure='diamond', a=5.43, mass_amu=None, pseudo_file=None, title=None, prefix='qe', pseudo_dir='./pseudo', outdir='./tmp', ecutwfc=16.0, ecutrho=96.0, nbnd=8, occupations='tetrahedra', degauss=0.0, conv_thr=1e-06, scf_k_points=(8, 8, 8, 0, 0, 0), include_dos=True, dos_emin=-6.0, dos_emax=10.0, dos_deltae=0.1, include_bands=True, bands_k_path=None, include_plotband=True, plotband_fermi_ev=0.0, plotband_weight=1.0, include_phonon=False, phonon_q_grid=(2, 2, 2), phonon_q_path=None, phonon_q_num=21, phonon_tr2_ph=1e-12)[source]¶

UI-like configurable bulk workflow with structure and optional phonons.

Parameters:

  • symbol (str)

  • structure (str)

  • a (float)

  • mass_amu (float | None)

  • pseudo_file (str | None)

  • title (str | None)

  • prefix (str)

  • pseudo_dir (str)

  • outdir (str)

  • ecutwfc (float)

  • ecutrho (float)

  • nbnd (int)

  • occupations (str)

  • degauss (float)

  • conv_thr (float)

  • scf_k_points (tuple[int, int, int, int, int, int])

  • include_dos (bool)

  • dos_emin (float)

  • dos_emax (float)

  • dos_deltae (float)

  • include_bands (bool)

  • bands_k_path (list[tuple[float, float, float, float]] | None)

  • include_plotband (bool)

  • plotband_fermi_ev (float)

  • plotband_weight (float)

  • include_phonon (bool)

  • phonon_q_grid (tuple[int, int, int])

  • phonon_q_path (list[tuple[float, float, float]] | None)

  • phonon_q_num (int)

  • phonon_tr2_ph (float)

Return type:

QEWorkflow

nanohubqe.templates.available_templates()[source]¶

Template names and short descriptions.

Return type:

dict[str, str]

Parsers for Quantum ESPRESSO text outputs.

class nanohubqe.parser.QERunSummary(total_energies_ry=<factory>, fermi_energy_ev=None, pressure_kbar=None, warnings=<factory>, completed=False)[source]¶

High-level values extracted from a pw.x output.

Parameters:

  • total_energies_ry (list[float])

  • fermi_energy_ev (float | None)

  • pressure_kbar (float | None)

  • warnings (list[str])

  • completed (bool)

class nanohubqe.parser.DOSData(energies_ev, density, integrated_density=None)[source]¶

Density-of-states data from dos.x-style tabular outputs.

Parameters:

  • energies_ev (list[float])

  • density (list[float])

  • integrated_density (list[float] | None)

class nanohubqe.parser.PDOSData(energies_ev, channels, source=None)[source]¶

Projected/partial DOS table with one or more channels.

Parameters:

  • energies_ev (list[float])

  • channels (dict[str, list[float]])

  • source (str | None)

class nanohubqe.parser.PhononDispersion(q_path, branches_cm1, q_points=None)[source]¶

Phonon branches sampled along a q-point path.

Parameters:

  • q_path (list[float])

  • branches_cm1 (list[list[float]])

  • q_points (list[tuple[float, float, float]] | None)

nanohubqe.parser.parse_pw_output(text)[source]¶

Parse a pw.x output string into QERunSummary.

Parameters:

text (str)

Return type:

QERunSummary

nanohubqe.parser.read_pw_output(path)[source]¶

Read and parse a pw.x output file from disk.

Parameters:

path (str | Path)

Return type:

QERunSummary

nanohubqe.parser.read_columns(path, ncols=2)[source]¶

Read whitespace-delimited numeric columns, skipping comments and blanks.

Parameters:

  • path (str | Path)

  • ncols (int)

Return type:

list[tuple[float, …]]

nanohubqe.parser.parse_dos_text(text, *, energy_column=0, dos_column=1, integrated_dos_column=2)[source]¶

Parse DOS table text into DOSData.

Parameters:

  • text (str)

  • energy_column (int)

  • dos_column (int)

  • integrated_dos_column (int | None)

Return type:

DOSData

nanohubqe.parser.read_dos(path, *, energy_column=0, dos_column=1, integrated_dos_column=2)[source]¶

Read a DOS table file into DOSData.

Parameters:

  • path (str | Path)

  • energy_column (int)

  • dos_column (int)

  • integrated_dos_column (int | None)

Return type:

DOSData

nanohubqe.parser.parse_pdos_text(text, *, energy_column=0, channel_labels=None)[source]¶

Parse a projected DOS table into PDOSData.

Parameters:

  • text (str)

  • energy_column (int)

  • channel_labels (list[str] | None)

Return type:

PDOSData

nanohubqe.parser.read_pdos(path, *, energy_column=0, channel_labels=None)[source]¶

Read a projected DOS file into PDOSData.

Parameters:

  • path (str | Path)

  • energy_column (int)

  • channel_labels (list[str] | None)

Return type:

PDOSData

nanohubqe.parser.read_pdos_directory(directory, *, pattern='*.pdos*', energy_column=0)[source]¶

Read a set of PDOS files and map them by filename stem.

Parameters:

  • directory (str | Path)

  • pattern (str)

  • energy_column (int)

Return type:

dict[str, PDOSData]

nanohubqe.parser.parse_matdyn_freq_text(text, *, q_mode='auto')[source]¶

Parse matdyn.x frequency-style output tables.

Parameters:

  • text (str)

  • q_mode (Literal['auto', 'distance', 'vector'])

Return type:

PhononDispersion

nanohubqe.parser.read_matdyn_freq(path, *, q_mode='auto')[source]¶

Read and parse a matdyn.x frequency table.

Parameters:

  • path (str | Path)

  • q_mode (Literal['auto', 'distance', 'vector'])

Return type:

PhononDispersion

nanohubqe.parser.read_bands_gnu(path)[source]¶

Read bands.x gnuplot-style file segments split by blank lines.

Parameters:

path (str | Path)

Return type:

list[tuple[list[float], list[float]]]

Plotting helpers for parsed Quantum ESPRESSO outputs.

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_total_energy(summary_or_path, *, unit='Ry', backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot the total energy history from an SCF/relax run.

Parameters:

  • summary_or_path (QERunSummary | str | Path)

  • unit (str)

  • backend (str)

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_run_curve(run_or_path, curve_id, *, backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot a curve from a Rappture/nanoHUB run XML output section.

Parameters:

  • run_or_path (NanoHUBRun | str | Path)

  • curve_id (str)

  • backend (str)

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_curve_data(curve, *, backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot a RunCurve with matplotlib or plotly backend.

Parameters:

  • curve (RunCurve)

  • backend (str)

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_bands(bands_file, *, fermi_energy_ev=None, backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot a bands.x gnuplot file with optional Fermi-level alignment.

Parameters:

  • bands_file (str | Path)

  • fermi_energy_ev (float | None)

  • backend (str)

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_dos(dos_or_path, *, fermi_energy_ev=None, backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot DOS from a file path or DOSData.

Parameters:

  • dos_or_path (DOSData | str | Path)

  • fermi_energy_ev (float | None)

  • backend (str)

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_pdos(pdos_or_path, *, channels=None, fermi_energy_ev=None, backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot projected DOS channels from a file path or PDOSData.

Parameters:

  • pdos_or_path (PDOSData | str | Path)

  • channels (list[str] | None)

  • fermi_energy_ev (float | None)

  • backend (str)

nanohubqe.visualize.plot_phonon_dispersion(dispersion_or_path, *, backend='matplotlib', ax=None)[source]¶

Plot phonon branches from matdyn.x frequency output.

Parameters:

  • dispersion_or_path (PhononDispersion | str | Path)

  • backend (str)

Run Records¶

Rappture/nanoHUB run XML parsing and generation helpers.

class nanohubqe.driver.RunCurve(curve_id, x, y, x_label=None, y_label=None, y_units=None)[source]¶

Curve data from a Rappture-style run XML output.

Parameters:

  • curve_id (str)

  • x (list[float])

  • y (list[float])

  • x_label (str | None)

  • y_label (str | None)

  • y_units (str | None)

class nanohubqe.driver.NanoHUBRun(tool_id=None, tool_name=None, tool_command=None, input_values=<factory>, output_strings=<factory>, output_curves=<factory>, status=None, time=None)[source]¶

Structured representation of a Rappture/nanoHUB run XML document.

Parameters:

  • tool_id (str | None)

  • tool_name (str | None)

  • tool_command (str | None)

  • input_values (dict[str, str])

  • output_strings (dict[str, str])

  • output_curves (dict[str, RunCurve])

  • status (str | None)

  • time (str | None)

to_xml_element()[source]¶

Convert this run record into an XML tree.

Return type:

Element

to_xml_string()[source]¶

Serialize this run record to XML text.

Return type:

str

write(path)[source]¶

Write this run record as XML to path.

Parameters:

path (str | Path)

Return type:

Path

nanohubqe.driver.parse_run_xml(path)[source]¶

Parse a Rappture/nanoHUB run XML file.

Parameters:

path (str | Path)

Return type:

NanoHUBRun

nanohubqe.driver.build_run_xml_from_results(results, *, workflow_name=None, tool_id='nanohubqe', tool_name='nanohub-qe', tool_command=None, curves=None)[source]¶

Build a run XML record from workflow execution results.

Parameters:

  • results (Mapping[str, object])

  • workflow_name (str | None)

  • tool_id (str)

  • tool_name (str)

  • tool_command (str | None)

  • curves (Mapping[str, RunCurve] | None)

Return type:

NanoHUBRun

nanohub-qe
